title: App schema + models: user_profiles + style_profiles (with 2 seeded presets)

task.description: Create app-specific schema module and wire DB init to apply it. Add user_profiles + style_profiles tables with SPEC constraints and seed exactly 2 system preset rows. Provide strict TS model helpers + snake↔camel mapping types.
acceptance_criteria: Running the app creates tables user_profiles and style_profiles with CHECK constraints matching SPEC (enums, length, is_system_preset in 0/1).
On a fresh DB, querying style_profiles where is_system_preset=1 returns exactly 2 rows and both have user_id IS NULL.
userProfile.getByUserId(userId) returns null when no row exists and returns a typed object when a row exists.
Creating a second user_profiles row for the same user_id throws/returns a DB error due to UNIQUE(user_id).
pnpm build succeeds with TypeScript strict enabled.

definition_of_done: Tables created via schema init without manual migration steps.
Seed executes idempotently (no duplicate presets on restart).
All model helpers compile under TypeScript strict.
No changes to template auth flows.
